news.t: Inverse China ETFs Jump Amid Spread of Coronavirus
Inverse China ETFs Break Out After Tariff Threat Tweet

overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort FTSE China 50 (FXP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE China 50 Net Tax USD index. The fund provides -2x exposure to a free-float-weighted index comprising 50 of the largest and most liquid Chinese stocks listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. FXP was launched on Nov 8, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.
infoTable: FTSE China 50 Net Tax USD Index

data.title: Inverse China ETFs Jump Amid Spread of Coronavirus
data.text: Chinese stocks suffered their largest one-day fall this year on reports that coronavirus has spread. Keep an eye on these inverse China ETFs.

data.title: Inverse China ETFs Break Out After Tariff Threat Tweet
data.text: Buyers returned to China bear ETFs after a Trump tweet reignited trade war fears. Trade against Chinese stocks using these funds.
